summary: Terms page successfully implements the diner aesthetic with proper cream card background, ink text, rose action links, and readable mobile layout. All required content sections are present with correct typography hierarchy.

violations.description: The 'support@flapjack.foo' link appears to use a slightly lighter rose color than the specified rest state #b83f5f for action links

actions: Verify the support email link uses the exact rose color #b83f5f specified in M.palette.10
Consider testing the hover state to ensure it transitions to the darker rose #8d2842 per M.palette.11
